heading: Disposition of proceeds of sale of cotton and of copies of standards
label: 57 Disposition of proceeds of sale of cotton and of copies of standards
text: Any moneys received from or in connection with the sale of cotton purchased for the preparation of the copies mentioned in and condemned as unsuitable for such use or with the sale of such copies may be expended for the purchase of other cotton for such use.section 56 of this title
notes: CodificationSection is composed of the last sentence of subsec. (a) of section 6 of act , as renumbered by section 401(b) of act . First five sentences of subsec. (a) of section 6 is classified to . Subsec. (b) of section 6 is classified to .Mar. 4, 1923Sept. 21, 1944section 56 of this titlesection 57a of this title
